data.content: Implementation complete on branch `worktree-foolery-5510-setlist-refinement` at commit `782db815`. The Setlist viewport now starts at the earliest unfinished slot that can fit inside the 12-step window, earlier completed steps remain reachable with Earlier navigation, and running terminal-session beats are highlighted with darker in-progress styling and animation. Validation passed: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build`.
